nasb.text: Now a certain man of the sons of the prophets said to another by the word of the Lord, “Please strike me.” But the man refused to strike him.

esv.text: And a certain man of the sons of the prophets said to his fellow at the command of the Lord, “Strike me, please.” But the man refused to strike him.

cnv.text: 先知門徒中有一個人奉耶和華的命令對他的一個同伴說：“你打我吧！”可是，那人卻不肯打他。

ccb.text: 众先知中有一位奉耶和华的命令对他的同伴说：“你打我吧！”同伴却不肯动手。
